news.summary: Eliza Labs has launched auto.fun, a no-code platform enabling users to create and deploy AI agents on Web3 applications. Designed for non-developers, auto.fun supports AI agents interacting with social media, DeFi apps, and other Web3 services. Users can automate tasks like yield farming, social media management, and trading through simple commands. The platform emphasizes accessibility, with user education integrated to guide informed choices. Auto.fun also introduces "fairer than fair" token launches utilizing a bonding curve mechanism, giving project teams flexibility and resources while limiting token dump potential. The platform is open source, allowing users to verify agent operations and data use. Notable agents on auto.fun include FightFi for social media competition, Secret for launching tokens, Sigma Music Agent for connecting musicians and fans, and Astra for cross-chain payments.
news.headline: Eliza Labs unveils auto.fun, no-code AI on Web3 apps. Platform democratizes AI, supports DeFi with agent creation, deployment.

news.summary: The latest report reveals that the unemployment rate in the country has dropped to 4.3%, marking a significant decrease from the previous month's rate of 5.1%. This decrease translates to approximately 900,000 new job opportunities created in various sectors. Additionally, the report shows that the GDP has grown by 6.5% in the last quarter, exceeding expectations. These positive economic indicators have contributed to an overall increase in consumer confidence, with retail sales seeing a boost of 8.2% compared to the same period last year. Experts predict continued economic growth in the coming months, noting the government's initiatives to support businesses and employment.
news.headline: UnitedHealth's forecast cut surprises insurers, causing concern in the industry. #Insurance #ForecastCut
Crypto Fear & Greed Index: 30/100 - Fear
Fear & Greed Index: 19/100 - Extreme Fear

news.summary: The Mantra OM token experienced a drastic crash, losing over 90% of its value in a single day on April 13. The token plummeted from over $6 to below $0.50, wiping out more than $5 billion in market cap. Various theories surrounding the collapse emerged, including rumors of insider dumping, forced liquidations, mislabeled wallets, and exchange manipulation. Mantra had secured a $1 billion deal to tokenize Dubai-based Damac Group's real estate and data centers, and the token had hit an all-time high of nearly $9 in February 2025. The company denied allegations of insider trading and a rug pull. Mantra's CEO blamed centralized exchanges for the crash, which was triggered during low-liquidity hours. Investigations revealed coordinated large-scale deposits and withdrawals across exchanges. Mantra planned a token buyback and burn program post-crash. Laser Digital denied ownership of wallets linked to the crash. The cause of the crash remains under investigation by an unnamed blockchain analyst.
news.headline: OM token lost over 90% of its value in a day, plummeting from $6 to under $0.50, wiping out $5B market cap. Chaos ensues in crypto world.

news.summary: In St. Petersburg, Florida on April 17, 2025, Raymond James is emphasizing its commitment to artificial intelligence by introducing its exclusive AI Search technology. This new tool, fueled by generative artificial intelligence, allows financial advisors and associates to ask questions in a natural language format to access the firm’s extensive internal knowledge base. Stuart Feld, the recently appointed chief artificial intelligence officer, indicated that this innovation aims to enhance service quality by providing accurate and customized information.
news.headline: Raymond James invests in AI with launch of proprietary AI Search technology, enhancing service with intuitive natural language questions to knowledge base.
Russian Foreign Ministry: Russia protests to Japan over drills near Russian border.

news.summary: On April 15, 2025, Partners Value Investments Inc. (TSXV: PVF.WT) announced that their non-voting exchangeable shares will begin trading on the TSX Venture Exchange under the symbol “PVF.A”. The trading is set to start on April 17, 2025. The Exchangeable Shares have been assigned CUSIP number 70214W104 and ISIN number CA70214W1041. TSX Trust Company will serve as the transfer agent for these shares.
news.headline: Partners Value Investments Inc. plans to list non-voting exchangeable shares on TSX Venture Exchange as "PVF.A" on April 17, 2025.

news.summary: On April 15, 2025, OTC Markets Group Inc. disclosed that Blue Moon Metals Inc., a company developing three brownfield polymetallic projects, now qualifies to trade on the OTCQX® Best Market, operated by OTC Markets Group Inc. This market oversees the trading of 12,000 U.S. and international securities. Blue Moon Metals Inc. transitioned to OTCQX from the OTCQB® Venture Market. The company's tickers are TSX-V: MOON and OTCQX: BMOOF.
news.headline: OTC Markets Group welcomes Blue Moon Metals Inc. to OTCQX, trading under BMOOF, upgrading from OTCQB Venture Market.

news.summary: Ark Invest CEO Cathie Wood has a controversial opinion on President Donald Trump's tariff policies, suggesting they could end a three-year "rolling recession." Wood believes that tariffs, initially seen as a harmful tax increase, could be strategic for trade negotiations. She thinks Trump's engagement of Treasury Secretary Scott Bessent hints at reduced tariffs and trade barriers. Wood highlighted Elon Musk's support in resolving trade issues. Ark Invest operates assuming the administration aims for economic growth and a strong stock market by the 2026 midterm elections. Wood anticipated strong growth in the latter half of 2025.
news.headline: Cathie Wood predicts Trump's trade moves could end recession, shift to lower tariffs. Tesla CEO supports trade barrier resolution. Wood anticipates economic growth leading up to 2026 elections.

news.summary: In Rochester, New York, on April 15, 2025, Syntec Optics Holdings, Inc. revealed a surge in the production of optomechanicals for advanced miniature aiming systems. The company, known for supplying mission-critical products to defense, biomedical, and communications manufacturers, has already shipped products worth almost $0.6M in 2025. They plan to ramp up production by almost 50% to fulfill orders totaling nearly $2.4M from April to October 2025. The projected total value of deliveries for 2025 is approximately $4M. With advancements in technology enhancing situational awareness and target engagement, there is a steady demand expected in the upcoming years.
news.headline: Syntec Optics (OPTX) sees growing demand, aiming for $4M in 2025 for defense optomechanicals.

news.summary: In Oslo on April 15, 2025, Hexagon Purus, a top manufacturer of zero emission solutions, secured its initial purchase order for the supply of advanced hydrogen fuel storage systems from MCV, a prominent bus maker in the Middle East and Africa. The deal amounts to around EUR 2.4 million. These cutting-edge systems by Hexagon Purus are set for delivery in 2025 to be installed on MCV's hydrogen fuel-cell electric buses. The buses are destined for the European public transportation sector.
news.headline: Hexagon Purus gets EUR 2.4M order from MCV for hydrogen storage systems for buses in Europe (Oslo, 15 April 2025).

news.summary: U.S. stock futures were volatile after a two-day advance, with major benchmark indices showing mixed premarket performance. Donald Trump hinted at aiding car companies with production transitions. Stocks had risen for two days after exempting certain products from tariffs. The 10-year Treasury bond yielded 4.38%, and the Fed likely to keep interest rates unchanged in May. Futures showed slight changes: Dow Jones -0.03%, S&P 500 0.08%, Nasdaq 100 0.25%, Russell 2000 -0.12%. SPY and QQQ ETFs rose in premarket. In the last session, Apple Inc. and Dell Technologies Inc. shares surged. Notably, the Dow Jones index was 10.1% lower than its 52-week high.
news.headline: US stock futures fluctuate post 2-day rally; Trump hints at aiding car companies. 10-year Treasury bond yields at 4.38% and 2-year bond at 3.86%. Fed likely to maintain current rates in May meeting. Dow -0.03%, S&P 500 0.08%, Nasdaq 100 0.25%, Russell 2000 -0.12%. SPY up 0.013% to $539.19, QQQ up 0.22% to $458.47 in premarket. Tech led Monday's gains. Dow 10.1% lower than 52-week high.

news.summary: In Pittsburgh, the Board of Directors of PPG declared a quarterly dividend of 68 cents per share for shareholders of record as of May 12, payable on June 12. This marks PPG's 507th consecutive dividend payment, showcasing its commitment to shareholders. The company has raised its annual dividend payment for 53 years in a row and has been providing uninterrupted annual dividends since 1899. PPG, traded on NYSE under ticker symbol PPG, is known for its mission of protecting and beautifying the world.
news.headline: PPG Board declares 68 cents quarterly dividend per share, marking 507th consecutive payment.

news.summary: The Company has reached a major achievement by generating initial revenues from its FDA-cleared life support technology at a prominent U.S. healthcare facility. They are now planning to deploy additional systems at a second hospital facility, marking a significant milestone for the company.
news.headline: Inspira Technologies reports first revenues from INSPIRA ART100 system deployment in US healthcare facility; more systems planned.

news.summary: A publicly traded company will now operate under a different name, focusing on the development, acquisition, and management of fertility clinics, along with the distribution of the FDA-approved INVOcell device. This strategic shift marks a significant change in the company's direction and underscores its commitment to the reproductive health sector. The company aims to enhance its presence in the market and capitalize on the growing demand for fertility treatments. By leveraging its expertise and resources, the company plans to expand its reach and offer innovative solutions to address the increasing fertility challenges faced by individuals and couples. This new direction is expected to drive growth and profitability for the company, as it solidifies its position as a key player in the fertility industry.
news.headline: NAYA Biosciences splits into INVO Fertility, Inc., focusing on fertility clinics and INVOcell device distribution.

news.summary: Following the release of important economic figures, the Dow Jones experienced an increase today. Bank of America also saw a significant rise in their stock value due to impressive earnings results. This positive movement in the market showcased the Dow Jones rising after the influential economic data was made public.
news.headline: Dow Jones up after key data; Bank of America surges on strong earnings. Market trends positive today.
US 4 Week Bill Auction

news.summary: Nvidia Corp. (NASDAQ: NVDA) has made a significant commitment of $500 billion to construct artificial intelligence supercomputers exclusively within the U.S. This move has garnered attention from both Washington and Wall Street as the trend of reshoring accelerates. President Donald Trump announced the decision in a post on Truth Social, highlighting that Nvidia will be granted expedited permits for its ambitious investment in U.S.-based AI infrastructure. Trump described the news as "very big and exciting." The announcement aligns with the Trump administration's broader efforts to boost domestic technology manufacturing and decrease dependence on China. Trump has also promised to speed up the permit process for other companies looking to invest in what he referred to as the "Golden Age of America." Additionally, the administration has confirmed exemptions to new tariffs of up to 145% on critical imports.
news.headline: Nvidia commits $500 billion to create U.S.-based AI supercomputers, endorsed by Trump to accelerate reshoring trends.

news.summary: A Canadian brand, Pita Pit, recognized for its fresh, customizable pitas and dedication to promoting healthier eating habits, marks 30 years of serving customers in its native country.
news.headline: Pita Pit marks 30 years of fresh, healthy pitas in Canada.

news.summary: U.S. Treasury Secretary Scott Bessent expressed confidence in the speed of trade negotiations and the stability of U.S. financial markets despite recent volatility in bonds and the dollar. The Trump administration aims to secure multiple trade agreements within a 90-day window, with a focus on reshaping global trade relationships and taking a tougher stance on China. Bessent emphasized the importance of fast-tracking trade talks with allies and establishing agreements in principle before the window closes. The administration has already engaged in discussions with Vietnamese and Japanese officials, with plans to continue negotiations with South Korea and Spain. Bessent highlighted the potential benefits for early movers in securing more favorable terms. The full story is available on Benzinga.com.
news.headline: U.S. Treasury Sec Bessent confident in trade negotiations despite market volatility, aims to finalize deals within 90 days.

news.summary: President Trump is heavily focusing on winning by enforcing tariffs on China. However, this move could hinder discussions on various topics, including Taiwan, fentanyl, TikTok, and more. The tariffs imposed on China are significant, ranging from 10% to 25% on $250 billion worth of Chinese goods. This aggressive stance by President Trump is causing tensions and uncertainties in the ongoing negotiations between the two countries.
news.headline: Trump's facing a trade war with China, risking other negotiations. Tariffs in focus, talks on Taiwan, fentanyl, TikTok impacted.

news.summary: A British proptech platform named T3RRA has revealed its worldwide public debut scheduled for October 2025. The platform will feature over $2 billion in tokenized real estate properties from various regions including the United States, United Kingdom, European Union, Asia, the Middle East, and Latin America. Utilizing artificial intelligence, blockchain technology, and regulatory framework, T3RRA enables verified users in more than 70 countries to engage with real estate assets in an unprecedented manner - digitally, securely, and with full financial visibility. The platform aims to revolutionize the real estate market, offering a novel way for users to access and trade properties.
news.headline: T3RRA to launch $2+ billion digital property platform globally in Oct 2025, enabling real estate trade in 70+ countries.

news.summary: The Entrepreneurs' Organization (EO) Baltimore has revealed details about its upcoming annual All-Chapter Retreat scheduled for May 12–14, 2025, at the picturesque Hyatt Regency Chesapeake Bay Golf Resort, Spa and Marina. The event is expected to bring together members of EO Baltimore for an immersive experience.
news.headline: Entrepreneurs' Organization Baltimore plans 2025 All-Chapter Retreat at Hyatt Regency Chesapeake Bay from May 12-14.

news.summary: Ford Audio-Video is calling on technology professionals, decision-makers, and innovators to attend an event called Innovate - A Technology Experience on Wednesday, April 30, 2025. The event will run from 9:00 AM to 3:00 PM at the Embassy Suites by Hilton in Loveland, Colorado. This gathering is expected to bring together a wide array of individuals with expertise and interest in technology, offering a platform for networking and knowledge exchange.
news.headline: Ford AV hosts Innovate tech showcase in Loveland, CO on April 30, 2025, from 9 AM to 3 PM at Embassy Suites by Hilton.

news.summary: Verified Market Research®, a prominent business intelligence and market analysis firm, has unveiled its latest report on the "Automotive Fuel Cell Market Size and Forecast." The report delves into key insights surrounding the increasing demand for zero-emission vehicles and the tightening emission regulations driving growth in the market. The comprehensive report provides in-depth analysis and a detailed forecast of the automotive fuel cell market, aiming to address the surging interest in sustainable transportation solutions.
news.headline: Global Automotive Fuel Cell Market anticipates revenue of USD 113.65 Billion by 2031, growing at 57.51% CAGR, states Verified Market Research®.

IMF's Managing Director Georgieva: Protectionism erodes productivity over the long run, especially in smaller economies. It hurts innovation.
IMF's Managing Director Georgieva: Rising tariffs hit growth upfront. Importers pay some part through lower profits and consumers pay higher prices.

news.summary: Orca Security, a leader in agentless cloud security, revealed a 140% year-over-year increase in customers in the Latin America (LATAM) area. This growth showcases the company's expanding influence in over 20 countries worldwide. Research from Grand View Research indicates the LATAM cloud computing sector is anticipated to see a 22.2% compound annual growth rate (CAGR) between 2025 and 2030, with the market expected to surpass $181 billion.
news.headline: Orca Security reports 140% customer growth in Latin America, contributing to its global growth in over 20 countries.LATAM cloud market projected to reach $181B CAGR by 2030.

news.summary: In Las Vegas, Aurora Payments, a payment technology provider, has named Avin Arumugam as Chief Product Officer (CPO). Arumugam, an experienced fintech and product leader, will oversee the Product teams and spearhead innovation of the ARISE payment platform. He joined Aurora on April 14 and reports to Brian Goudie, the Chief Executive Officer. This move signifies Aurora's commitment to evolving their cloud-based payment solutions and expanding their intelligent payment ecosystem under Arumugam's leadership.
news.headline: Avin Arumugam named Chief Product Officer at Aurora Payments, leading Product teams and innovating payment platform.

news.summary: In San Francisco, The Play Company, a tournament platform, and 2K, known for NBA 2K, will introduce Play NBA 2K on April 17, 2025. Play NBA 2K will be available within Play OS, offering players from the NBA 2K community opportunities to engage in weekly tournaments hosted by celebrities. This service will include free tournaments along with paid entry events, catering to the gaming community.
news.headline: The Play Company and 2K Ink partnership launches Play NBA 2K tournament service on April 17, 2025, offering free and paid tournaments.

news.summary: In Chicago, an independent study conducted by Aon researchers revealed substantial cost savings for employers who provide Hello Heart's digital heart health program. The study emphasized the noteworthy reduction in expenses for these employers.
news.headline: Independent study by Aon shows Hello Heart's program reduces medical claims costs for employers significantly.

news.summary: Middleton, Massachusetts - On April 17, 2025, the QKS Group, a leading market intelligence and advisory firm, published a comprehensive analysis of the worldwide IT Infrastructure Monitoring Tools Market. The report predicts a steady demand growth across sectors, showcasing a sustainable Compound Annual Growth Rate (CAGR) of 7.96%. This indicates a promising outlook for the market in the coming years.
news.headline: Global IT Infrastructure Monitoring Tools Market projected to grow at 7.96% CAGR through 2030, reflecting enduring demand.

news.summary: This week's Nintendo Download offers Nintendo Switch users access to Monument Valley and Monument Valley 2 on the Nintendo eShop. These meditative puzzle games offer serene journeys through isometric worlds with unique puzzles, mesmerizing landscapes, optical illusions, and hidden secrets to reveal. Both games include extra chapters for extended gameplay. Available for download, the titles offer players a tranquil yet challenging experience on the go.
news.headline: Nintendo Download features Monument Valley and Monument Valley 2 on Nintendo Switch with peaceful puzzles and stunning landscapes.

news.summary: A report by MarketsandMarkets™ forecasts that the US Drone Package Delivery market is expected to grow significantly, reaching USD 1,080.1 million by 2030, up from an estimated USD 225.2 million in 2024. This growth represents a compound annual growth rate (CAGR) of 28.6% over the forecast period.
news.headline: US Drone Package Delivery market to reach $1,080.1 million by 2030, growing at 28.6% CAGR from $225.2 million in 2024, per MarketsandMarkets report.

news.summary: In Palo Alto, California, the top Enterprise Orchestration platform, Workato®, disclosed the recipients of the seventh Workato Partner Awards during the 2025 Workato Partner Kickoff events in Bellevue, Washington, and Lisbon, Portugal. More than 300 partners gathered at the venues to commemorate successes from the previous year and gain knowledge and direction for the upcoming year. The events aimed to enhance partnerships and coordination among attendees.
news.headline: Workato awards top partners at 2025 Partner Kick-Offs with 300+ global partners gathering in person for event.

news.summary: In Fort Bend, Texas, Kinetic has announced a major network hardware upgrade valued at $23 million that is set to benefit over 21,000 Texans. The company has revealed plans for a substantial enhancement of its residential and business fiber network speeds by 2025. Following this upgrade, internet speeds reaching up to 2 Gigabits per second will be accessible to 1,500 eligible customers in Sugar Land. This initiative is aimed at doubling speeds for a significant number of Kinetic Fiber properties, totaling over half a million homes and businesses.
news.headline: Kinetic to upgrade Texas network with $23 million, benefiting 21,000 Texans. 2 Gigabits per second for 1,500 clients in Sugar Land. Speeds to double for over 500,000 Kinetic Fiber homes and businesses.

news.summary: In Charlotte, North Carolina, Duke Energy (NYSE: DUK) has announced that its annual shareholders meeting will take place virtually on May 1, 2025, at 1 p.m. Eastern Time. During the meeting, Duke Energy's President and CEO, Harry Sideris, will discuss the company's performance in 2024 and its progress in energy modernization.
news.headline: Duke Energy's annual shareholders meeting to be held online on May 1 at 1 p.m. ET, with CEO discussing 2024 performance.

news.summary: SEKO Logistics, based in Schaumburg, Illinois, has named Gordon Branov as its new Chief Executive Officer, with his appointment set to begin on April 21, 2025.
news.headline: SEKO Logistics appoints Gordon Branov as CEO starting April 21, 2025.

news.summary: In Delray Beach, Florida, on April 17, 2025, a new exclusive guide titled "How to Write a Cookbook" was introduced by popular author and PBS personality, Pati Jinich. This guide is designed for food enthusiasts aspiring to document their favorite recipes in a cookbook format. Pati Jinich, known for her bestselling books and TV presence, offers valuable insights for those looking to preserve their cherished recipes in a professional manner. This guide is published by a premium publisher, providing a comprehensive approach to cookbook writing for all culinary enthusiasts.
news.headline: Pati Jinich launches new cookbook workbook with Levenger, offering a guide on writing cookbooks.

news.summary: The Blockchain Deposit Insurance Corporation (BDIC), a cryptocurrency insurer specializing in security for digital currency wallets, has selected 3Point0 Labs as its Agency of Record. This partnership comes ahead of BDIC's planned insurance solution and token launch in the fourth quarter of 2025. 3Point0 Labs will collaborate with BDIC's Chief Marketing Officer and marketing team to enhance brand visibility, boost engagement, and amplify BDIC's message.
news.headline: BDIC partners with 3Point0 Labs, aims to enhance brand image ahead of Q4 2025 insurance solution & token launch.

news.summary: In a recent announcement on April 17, 2025, Biostate AI, a prominent player in artificial intelligence for RNA sequencing, revealed a new strategic collaboration with the Accelerated Cure Project (ACP), a non-profit focused on expediting research efforts. The partnership aims to leverage the strengths of both organizations to drive advancements in the field. This development signifies a significant step towards accelerating progress in RNA sequencing research.
news.headline: Biostate AI partners with Accelerated Cure Project to develop AI models for Multiple Sclerosis. [Houston, Waltham, April 17, 2025]

news.summary: On Friday, April 18, 2025, Sify Technologies (NASDAQ: SIFY) is set to announce its quarterly earnings report. Analysts predict the company will post an earnings per share (EPS) of $0.06. Investors are eagerly awaiting the results, anticipating potential outperformance of expectations and optimistic guidance for the upcoming quarter. This update is crucial for new investors seeking to make informed decisions. Check out the full story on Benzinga.com.
news.headline: Sify Technologies on NASDAQ set to announce Q1 earnings on 2025-04-18, with expected EPS of $0.06. Investors await results.

news.summary: A report from ISG Provider Lens™ will analyze the strengths and market competitiveness of service providers in the VMware ecosystem. The report will focus on examining the portfolios of various providers in this dynamic industry. The report is anticipated to provide valuable insights for businesses looking to leverage VMware solutions.
news.headline: ISG to assess VMware ecosystem globally with Provider Lens report, analyzing service providers market.

news.summary: In Westlake, Texas on April 17, 2025, DealerFire, a top provider of automotive digital marketing solutions under the Solera umbrella, is offering guidance to dealerships on enhancing their website effectiveness. This initiative aims to assist dealers in converting casual website visitors into actual buyers, ultimately boosting sales figures. DealerFire's expertise in this area can make a significant difference for dealerships looking to improve their online presence and engagement.
news.headline: Read DealerFire's guide to reduce bounce rates and turn browsers into buyers. DealerFire is part of Solera, offering automotive marketing solutions.

news.summary: Calgary-based Reconnaissance Energy Africa Ltd. (ReconAfrica) has disclosed a joint exploration project in Angola. The Company, listed on TSXV as RECO, OTCQX as RECAF, Frankfurt as 0XD, and NSX as REC, has secured this agreement with the Agência Nacional de Petróleo, Gás e. This move reflects ReconAfrica's strategic expansion efforts in the global energy sector.
news.headline: ReconAfrica adds 5.2 million acres in Angola joint exploration project, potential along Damara Fold Belt.
